name: Bean Bread ..Lentil, Black..
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, beans, applesauce, honey, and salt.
3. Add the whole-wheat flour, bread flour, and yeast to the wet ingredients.
4. Mix all the ingredients together until a dough forms.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing and serving.
D. German II Med Page 67 NOTES: OK tasting and quality. Can't tell it has black beans in it. Would pick this to go with soup.
